description_long: This object is a modern digital wristwatch with a rectangular face and a black adjustable strap. The watch face features a digital display, likely showing the time and other information, protected by a clear cover. The strap is perforated with multiple holes for size adjustment and is made of a flexible, durable material, probably silicone or rubber. The watch case appears to be made of plastic or a lightweight metal, with a slightly raised bezel around the display. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for everyday urban use. The back of the watch may contain sensors or a charging port, typical for smartwatches or fitness trackers.
description: A sleek digital wristwatch with a rectangular display and a black adjustable strap, designed for everyday urban wear. The watch features a clear digital screen and a perforated strap for comfort and fit.
description_view_0: A side profile showing the thinness of the watch and the slight protrusion of the watch case.
description_view_1: A top-down view of the watch with the strap fully extended, highlighting the adjustment holes and the plain watch face.
description_view_2: Another side profile, mirroring view 0, emphasizing the slim design and the watch case's thickness.
description_view_3: A top-down view showing the digital display active, with visible time and information on the screen.
